case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ERICK JAVIER PACHECO ZALAZAR

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZALAZAR, ERICK JAVIER PACHECO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ZALAZAR, ERICK JAVIER PACHECO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED AUG-06-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZALAZAR, ERICK JAVIER PACHECO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
